_comment: Master English string table for Ecdysium. Keys follow `<scope>.<topic>.<id>`. See `src/i18n.rs` for the lookup helpers (`tr`, `tr_fmt!`) and the rules around placeholders. Adding a new language: copy this file to `assets/i18n/<lang>-<region>.json` and translate the values; keys must stay identical. Translators should NOT touch keys, only values.
intro.title: ECDYSIUM
intro.subtitle: Press any key to continue
title.hint: Up/Down (or W/S) select  -  Enter / Click confirm
pause.title: PAUSED
pause.hint: Up/Down (or W/S) select  -  Enter / Click confirm  -  Esc resume
ui.save.title: SAVE GAME
ui.save.prompt_label: Enter a name (or press Enter to accept):
ui.save.hint: Enter confirm  -  Esc cancel  -  Backspace edit
ui.load.title: LOAD GAME
ui.load.empty: No saves found. Save from the pause menu first.
ui.load.hint: Up/Down select  -  Enter confirm  -  Esc cancel
log.door.locked: It's locked. You need an access key.
log.door.closed_hint: The door is closed. (Press E to open.)
log.door.something_in_way: Something's in the way - you can't close it.
log.interact.choose_dir: Interact in which direction? (Arrows / numpad - Esc cancels)
log.interact.choose_dir_with_self: Interact in which direction? (Arrows / numpad - `.` for here - Esc cancels)
log.interact.nothing_there: Nothing to interact with in that direction.
log.stunned: You're stunned - you can't act this turn.
log.spawn.fresh: A new survivor awakens on level {0}.
log.death: You collapse. The floor welcomes you.
log.stims.activated: Combat Stims activated! +2 damage for {0} turns.
log.combat.punch_kill: You crack open the {0} with a bare fist.
log.combat.kick_back: You kick the {0} back a step. It reels, stunned.
log.combat.kick_pinned: You boot the {0} into the wall behind it. It reels, stunned.
log.combat.monster_hit_ranged: The {0} fires at you for {1} damage.
log.combat.monster_miss_ranged: The {0} fires at you but misses.
log.combat.monster_miss_melee: The {0} lunges at you but misses.
log.drop.station_master_keycard: The Station Master's casing splits. An admin keycard slides free.
log.xp.level_up: You reach level {0}! Max HP +1, fully healed.
log.hazard.collapse: The floor gives way! You fall and take 1 damage.
log.hazard.medical_metabolize: Your rad-resistant biotech drinks in the radiation. +1 HP.
log.hazard.fire_pool: Flames lick at your boots. You catch fire.
log.fire.no_ranged_weapon: You have no ranged weapon in hand or in reserve.
log.fire.drew: You snap up the {0} from your reserve and bring it to bear.
log.swap.done: You bring the {0} into hand; the {1} goes to your reserve.
log.swap.empty: Your hands are empty and so is your reserve.
log.equip.no_utility_belt: You need a utility belt to use that pouch.
log.equip.belt_dump: Your {0} falls free from the unfastened belt.
log.throw.nothing_assigned: Nothing is queued in your throw hand.
log.panel.keycard_unlock: The keycard reads. The Control Panel unlocks with a chirp.
log.panel.override: You override the Control Panel. The ship's systems begin shutdown.
log.panel.escape: The escape pods activate. You're getting out of here.
log.panel.locked: The Control Panel is locked. The Station Master still lives.
item.medkit.name: medical kit
item.medkit.description: A sealed medical pouch with bandages and anti-septic. Restores 2 health.
item.ration_cube.name: ration cube
item.ration_cube.description: A standard-issue ration cube with savory flavoring.
item.admin_keycard.name: admin keycard
item.admin_keycard.description: Pried from a dead administrator. Opens the final Control Panel regardless of what else survives.
item.flight_jumpsuit.name: flight jumpsuit
item.flight_jumpsuit.description: Standard-issue cryo-pod jumpsuit. Provides modest protection. Equip for +1 AC.
item.hand_lamp.name: hand lamp
item.hand_lamp.description: A battery-powered shoulder lamp. Held in the off-hand; widens what you can see in unlit corridors.
item.duct_tape.name: duct tape
item.duct_tape.description: A roll of industrial duct tape. Universal binding component for crafting.
item.rag.name: rag
item.rag.description: A bundle of cleaning rags. Padding, wrapping, fuel - a flexible crafting component.
item.glass_bottle.name: glass bottle
item.glass_bottle.description: An empty glass bottle. Throwable in a pinch; the real value is as a Molotov component.
item.solvent.name: bottle of solvent
item.solvent.description: Industrial solvent. Flammable; doubles as antiseptic. Splash, fuel, or component.
item.lighter.name: lighter
item.lighter.description: A pocket lighter. Tool, not consumed by recipes - used as ignition source for fire-based crafts.
item.battery.name: battery
item.battery.description: A spent-but-charged power cell. Powers the hand lamp or the shock prod.
item.bandages.name: bandages
item.bandages.description: A roll of sterile bandages. Restores 1 HP on use; crafts into a Field Dressing for more.
item.wire_spool.name: wire spool
item.wire_spool.description: A spool of insulated wire. Binding, electronics, improvised circuits.
item.work_gloves.name: work gloves
item.work_gloves.description: Heavy work gloves. Heat- and abrasion-resistant; equip for a small AC bump.
item.sheet_metal_scrap.name: sheet metal scrap
item.sheet_metal_scrap.description: A jagged sheet of hull plating. Raw material for a shield or a chest plate.
item.molotov.name: Molotov cocktail
item.molotov.description: A solvent-soaked rag stuffed in a glass bottle. Light it, throw it, run. (Throw mechanic TBD.)
item.torch.name: torch
item.torch.description: A fuel-soaked rag wrapped on a stick. Lights the way and bashes faces. Held in the off-hand.
item.improvised_shield.name: improvised shield
item.improvised_shield.description: A welded plate strapped to your forearm. Equip for a small AC bump.
item.chest_plate.name: chest plate
item.chest_plate.description: A bolted-together hull-plate cuirass. Body slot; +2 AC.
item.field_dressing.name: field dressing
item.field_dressing.description: An upgraded medical patch. Restores 3 HP and clears poison / radiation status.
item.utility_belt.name: utility belt
item.utility_belt.description: A two-pouch waist belt. Worn to enable both belt-pouch slots - clip a hand lamp here and it still sheds light.
item.weapon.description: A scavenged weapon. Use this item to equip it.
weapon.survival_rifle.name: survival rifle
weapon.survival_rifle.description: Standard-issue cryo-pod sidearm. Light caliber, fast cycle, two-handed. Enough to clear the first deck if you stay patient.
weapon.survival_rifle.melee.hit: You crack the {target} with the rifle's stock for {damage} damage.
weapon.survival_rifle.melee.kill: You bash the {target}'s skull with the rifle stock.
weapon.survival_rifle.ranged.hit: The survival rifle round bites the {target} for {damage} damage.
weapon.survival_rifle.ranged.kill: The survival rifle round drops the {target}.
weapon.assault_rifle.name: assault rifle
weapon.assault_rifle.description: Security-detail rifle. Faster fire rate than the survival model and longer reach. Two-handed.
weapon.assault_rifle.melee.kill: You crack the {target}'s skull with the rifle butt.
weapon.assault_rifle.ranged.hit: The round bites into the {target} for {damage} damage.
weapon.scrap_pistol.name: scrap pistol
weapon.scrap_pistol.description: A pistol cobbled together from machine-shop scrap. Hits harder than a rifle round per shot but cycles slowly. One-handed - pairs with a lamp or shield.
weapon.scrap_pistol.melee.hit: You tap the {target} with the pistol for {damage} damage.
weapon.scrap_pistol.melee.kill: You bludgeon the {target} with the pistol.
weapon.scrap_pistol.ranged.hit: The pistol shot grazes the {target} for {damage} damage.
weapon.plasma_rifle.name: plasma rifle
weapon.plasma_rifle.description: Engineering's prized superheated-gas rifle. Slow to recharge between shots but every bolt sears through plating. Two-handed.
weapon.plasma_rifle.melee.hit: You smash the {target} with the rifle for {damage} damage.
weapon.plasma_rifle.ranged.hit: The plasma bolt sears the {target} for {damage} damage!
weapon.auto_hammer.name: auto-hammer
weapon.auto_hammer.description: A motorised demolition hammer. Two-handed, no ranged option, but a single swing dismantles most things in front of it.
weapon.auto_hammer.melee.hit: The hammer crushes the {target} for {damage} damage!
weapon.clawed_gauntlet.name: clawed gauntlet
weapon.clawed_gauntlet.description: A bracer fitted with mining picks. Strapped, not held - leaves the other hand free for whatever else you can scavenge.
weapon.clawed_gauntlet.melee.hit: Your claws rake the {target} for {damage} damage.
weapon.wrench.name: wrench
weapon.wrench.description: Heavy maintenance wrench. One-handed, 1d4 melee. Pairs with a hand-lamp in the off hand.
weapon.wrench.melee.hit: You crack the {target} with the wrench for {damage} damage.
weapon.wrench.melee.kill: You cave in the {target}'s skull with the wrench.
weapon.mop.name: mop
weapon.mop.description: An industrial mop scavenged from the janitor's closet. Two-handed, weak, awkward - but it's what you've got.
weapon.mop.melee.hit: You whack the {target} with the mop for {damage} damage.
weapon.mop.melee.kill: You batter the {target} senseless with the mop.
weapon.great_club.name: great club
weapon.great_club.description: Mop haft, wrench head, half a roll of duct tape. Slow swing, two-handed - but a clean hit deletes most things on the deck.
weapon.great_club.melee.hit: You swing the great club into the {target} for {damage} damage.
weapon.great_club.melee.kill: The great club caves the {target} flat.
weapon.shock_prod.name: shock prod
weapon.shock_prod.description: A baton wired to a battery via a wrench head and a spool of insulated wire. One-handed, sparking, mean.
weapon.shock_prod.melee.hit: The shock prod arcs into the {target} for {damage} damage.
creature.scavenger_drone.name: Scavenger Drone
creature.scavenger_drone.description: A small, skittish drone. Barely threatening alone, but dangerous in packs.
creature.mutant_human.name: Mutant Human
creature.mutant_human.description: A twisted human form, ravaged by radiation. Once crew, now dangerous.
creature.swarm_beetle.name: Swarm Beetle
creature.swarm_beetle.description: A chitinous insectoid, one of a horde. Likely a specimen from the biosphere bay.
creature.rogue_bot.name: Rogue Sentinel
creature.rogue_bot.description: A hovering drone, running on corrupted AI protocols. Ship-systems gone wrong.
creature.mutant_crab.name: Mutant Crab
creature.mutant_crab.description: A crustacean mutant with oversized claws. Hunted, escaped from containment.
creature.radiation_spore.name: Radiation Spore
creature.radiation_spore.description: A glowing, pulsating spore cloud. Avoid direct exposure. Inflicts poison.
creature.station_master.name: Station Master
creature.station_master.description: The corrupted administrative AI, now a warped amalgam of flesh and machinery. Its presence warps reality itself.
creature.gruboid.name: Gruboid
creature.gruboid.description: A pale, slithering thing with a lamprey-like mouth full of needle teeth. It has no analogue in any of the colony's agricultural or terraforming manifests; the Custodian's logs simply tag it 'pest' and move on. It moves faster than its boneless anatomy ought to allow, and it never seems to hunt alone.
creature.ant.name: Ant
creature.ant.description: A dog-sized soldier ant. Hydroponics manifest listed a colony for soil aeration; the cascade did the rest. Mandibles like wire-cutters and a chemical trail that the rest of the nest can read at a glance - one means several.
prop.cryo_tube.name: cryo tube
prop.cryo_tube.description: An empty cryo tube. The lid hangs open, frost still clinging to the rim. The diagnostic readout still scrolls - this was where you woke up.
prop.cryo_tube_occupied.name: occupied cryo tube
prop.cryo_tube_occupied.description: An occupied cryo tube. A colonist is suspended inside, vitals reading nominal - they appear to be healthy. The diagnostic panel scrolls on, indifferent to your presence.
prop.cryo_tube_occupied.locked_reason: The tube's terminal blinks red. You don't have permission to access its systems.
prop.locker_unlocked.name: supply locker
prop.locker_unlocked.description: A standard-issue cryo-bay supply locker. The latch hangs loose and the door drifts open and closed in the recirculator's draft.
prop.storage_crate.name: storage crate
prop.storage_crate.description: A battered ship-stores crate, half its stencilling scoured off. Tipped on its side, easy to step over and easy to pry open.
prop.custodibot_deactivated.name: deactivated custodibot
prop.custodibot_deactivated.description: A maintenance bot folded into its sleep crouch by the closet wall. The status LED on its chest blinks slow amber - power-saving, not dead. It doesn't react to your presence.
class.engineering.name: Engineering
class.engineering.description: A maintenance specialist trained on the colony's modular ship systems. Knows where the spare parts hide and what the dim corridors are actually concealing.
class.security.name: Security
class.security.description: Colony security, augmented with a reinforced exoskeleton and combat stims. Built for boarding actions, hand-to-hand suppression, and corridor breaches.
class.science.name: Science
class.science.description: Research-track colonist with sensor implants and lab-grade marksmanship. Trained to read instruments, not faces - but her aim is sharper than most.
class.medical.name: Medical
class.medical.description: Colony medic, modified with rad-resistant biotech and a hardened immune system. Patches up the rest of the crew - and herself, when the shielding fails.
ui.inventory.title: INVENTORY
ui.inventory.hint: Letters use / equip - 1-9 collapse - I or Esc close
ui.equipment.title: EQUIPMENT
ui.equipment.hint: Letters select - U / Q act - Tab or Esc close
ui.crafting.title: CRAFTING
ui.crafting.hint: Letters focus - F craft - C or Esc close
ui.crafting.qty_hint: Up/Down adjust - Enter craft - Esc cancel
ui.loot.title: LOOT
ui.loot.hint: Letters take - R take all - Esc close
ui.class_select.title: CHOOSE A DEPARTMENT
ui.roll_stats.title: ROLL YOUR STATS
ui.roll_stats.hint: R / Space re-roll - Enter / Click confirm
ui.game_over.title: YOU DIED
ui.game_over.hint: Press any key to thaw another colonist
ui.class_select.hint_full: Up/Down / WS  select  -  Enter / Space  confirm
ui.examine.title: The {0}.
ui.crafting.qty_hint_full: Up/Down adjust  -  Enter confirm  -  Esc cancel
log.equip.right_hand_busy: Your right hand is busy with the {0}. Unequip it first.
log.use.medkit: You apply medical supplies. Wounds are tended.
log.use.ration_cube: You eat the ration cube. The flavoring lingers, surprisingly savory.
log.equip.flight_jumpsuit: You step into the flight jumpsuit. Better than nothing.
slot.head: Head
